feat: load runtime download URLs from config file

This allows users to modify binary versions without recompiling.

refactor: fix architecture violations and add workflow gate

Fix architecture violations where Server Actions bypassed the domain
layer with direct Drizzle queries. All actions now wire through use
cases via createServerContainer(). Also add workflow gate to CLAUDE.md
to prevent recurrence.

Changes:
- Add ## Workflow section to CLAUDE.md with /create-issue step
- Add import 'server-only' guards to lib/db.ts, lib/auth.ts, lib/schema.ts
- Fix ServerContainer interface to use domain abstractions (no *Impl types)
- Wire all Server Actions through use cases (transactions, categories, budget-settings, dashboard)
- Create missing DeleteBudgetSettingUseCase
- Move actions from src/app/actions/ to src/presentation/features/*/actions/
- Fix schema imports → domain entity imports in presentation layer
- Extract ViewModel hooks for TransactionDetailView, TransactionNewView, BudgetSettingNewView, BudgetSettingEditView, SetupView
- Replace setFilters raw setter with applyFilters named wrapper in useTransactionsViewModel
- Import DashboardData type from domain in useDashboardViewModel
- Accept redirectOrigin constructor param in AuthDataSourceImpl (SSR-safe)

commit.message:
feat: wire stress-test BBL generators into MockMSPClient auto-flight (#182)

Stress generators (poor quality, mechanical, windy) were dead code —
now wired via stress schedule system. MockMSPClient checks per-cycle
overrides in eraseBlackboxFlash() and uses stress generators when
matched. DEMO_STRESS=true env var auto-configures the schedule:
cycle 0 = poor quality, cycle 1 = windy, cycle 2 = mechanical,
cycles 3-4 = normal progressive (shows recovery).

E2E fixture gets stressMode option, stress spec passes it through.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix EV charging too fast when battery discharging (v1.0.34)

When the home battery is discharging to support EV charging, the grid
import (p1) appears artificially low, making PM think solar covers the
EV load. This caused EV to charge at 14A (9.7kW) with only 4.3kW PV,
rapidly draining the battery.

Fix: subtract battery discharge power from available_power so EV amps
match actual solar production (e.g., 6A for 4.3kW PV instead of 14A).

commit.message:
fix: test generation stability — dynamic tokens, smaller hard chunks, partial results

- MAX_RETRIES 1→2, TIME_BUDGET 40s→50s for more retry room
- CHUNK_SIZE 10→7 for hard difficulty (verbose output)
- Dynamic maxTokens per chunk (difficulty×questions+overhead vs flat 4000)
- Detect finish_reason=length in GPT calls (truncated JSON → descriptive error)
- Per-chunk error isolation: one failed chunk doesn't kill parallel batch
- Accept partial results instead of failing (7/10 questions > 0)
- JSON retry budget 15s→20s in callGPTJSON

commit.message:
Add logging to debug receipt modal not appearing

**Issue:**
- Receipt modal requires clicking "record sales" again to appear
- Need to understand when/why modal state is being lost

**Added logging:**
1. After sale save - logs when receipt modal should show
2. On render - logs showReceiptModal and receiptData state
3. On close - logs when modal closes

This will help identify if state is:
- Being set but not rendering
- Being reset by parent component
- Being lost during re-renders

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix WhatsApp receipt not showing message text

**Problem:**
- WhatsApp was opening with only phone number, no receipt text
- Using location.href on mobile was navigating away from page

**Solution:**
- Always use window.open(_blank) first to avoid navigation
- Falls back to location.href only if window.open fails
- Added detailed logging: phone, message length, full URL
- This prevents page navigation while opening WhatsApp

**Changes:**
- Removed mobile/desktop branch in openWhatsApp
- Try window.open first on all devices
- Fallback to location.href if blocked
- Log success/failure for debugging

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

NPU inference pipeline working via Windows.AI.MachineLearning

The WinML→NPU pipeline (DirectXMinPower) is confirmed working:
- ONNX model generated in-memory (OnnxBuilder.cs, fixed protobuf encoding)
- LearningModel loads and session creates successfully
- Inference runs at 2560×1440 per frame when NPU toggle is on
- volatile _npuEnabled ensures cross-thread visibility
- _srPipeline cleared on Dispose/reinit'd in Initialize() for reconnects
- Removed all diagnostic logging

Currently uses Identity passthrough model; Conv sharpening model pending
kernel_shape attribute fix in protobuf encoding.

refactor: use rename-first strategy, copy+delete only as fallback

Same-filesystem moves use rename() (instant, zero IO). Only falls back
to copy+delete for cross-filesystem (EXDEV) or Windows file lock
(WinError 5). Also renames file in-place first if name doesn't match
target convention before moving to target directory.

commit.message:
V67: Verrouillage définitif — 1 Super Admin = 1 seule vitrine (homepage)

Problème: Le Super Admin pouvait voir deux vitrines différentes (CoachVitrine
vs Homepage). Ce commit verrouille TOUS les chemins pour que ça ne revienne plus.

Protections ajoutées:
- App.js useEffect: /coach/bassi → replaceState /?visitor=true
- App.js render: détection synchrone du slug Super Admin dans l'URL
- App.js coachMode: CoachVitrine bloquée si slug = Super Admin
- App.js PartnersCarousel: clic sur Super Admin → scroll, pas CoachVitrine
- CoachDashboard: coachVitrineUrl = /?visitor=true pour Super Admin
- DashboardHeader: même logique
- Suppression de TOUTES les références fonctionnelles à /coach/bassi

SUPER_ADMIN_SLUGS = ['bassi', 'artboost', 'afroboost']
Règle: 1 utilisateur = 1 seule vitrine, verrouillé définitivement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: prevent infinite 401 retry loop + add global ErrorBoundary

API client: add _retryCount parameter (max 1) to prevent infinite
recursive 401 refresh loops when server invalidates all tokens.
Root layout: export ErrorBoundary component that catches unhandled
JS exceptions with retry button instead of white screen crash.

fix: skip copy when source file is already at target path

Avoids unnecessary copy+delete when the file is already correctly
named and in the right directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: alpha.17 — QA M2, polimento, acessibilidade

Accessibility:
- role="dialog" + aria-modal on EditSheet, ConfirmDialog, SettingsDrawer, CheckInPrompt
- role="alertdialog" + aria-labelledby on ConfirmDialog
- role="combobox" + aria-autocomplete on CommandPalette input
- role="listbox" on CommandPalette results
- role="alert" on ErrorBoundary fallback
- role="status" + aria-live="polite" on TopBar offline indicator
- aria-live="polite" on Toast container
- aria-label on all icon-only buttons (BottomNav, TopBar, Toast, ItemRow, AtomInput)
- aria-pressed on EmotionPicker chips
- role="checkbox" + aria-checked on ItemRow complete button
- role="progressbar" with aria-valuenow on ProjectCard
- aria-busy on Skeleton loading states
- aria-current="page" on active BottomNav item
- Focus trap with Tab key capture on SettingsDrawer

Performance:
- React.memo on ItemRow (prevents unnecessary re-renders in lists)
- Deterministic skeleton widths (no Math.random() in render)
- Cleanup tooltip setTimeout on AtomInput unmount

Bug fixes:

rich_rendering.py:
- Add build_rich_raw_table(fetch_result) -> Table with:

  - Column header styles (_RAW_RESULTS_COL_STYLES)
  - Cell truncation (_RAW_RESULTS_COL_TRUNCATE: string->30 chars)
  - URL truncation in props cells (_truncate_urls_in_cell, 15 chars + ellipsis)

roam_tree_loader.py:
- Add should_transcribe parameter; return (NodeFetchResult, VertexTree | None)
- Return None for vertex_tree when should_transcribe=False

export_roam_tree.py:
- Handle VertexTree | None from updated fetch_roam_trees signature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace rename with copy+delete to avoid Windows WinError 5

Root cause: Path.rename() requires DELETE permission on source file.
Windows Defender/indexer/thumbnail generators open files without
FILE_SHARE_DELETE, making rename always fail. Copy only needs READ
(universally shared), so it never gets blocked. Source deletion is
retried separately and tolerates failure since data is already safe
at destination. This matches how Windows Explorer handles file moves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Document Flask security model and shutdown timeout in architecture.md

Two design decisions from the Fixed table that weren't captured in
architecture.md: Flask runs as bwinter_sc81 (not root) with a minimal
sudoers drop-in; game-shutdown.service TimeoutStartSec=600 because
VRising takes up to ~390s to save and exit cleanly.

protocol split (fix does task work, wrap is the universal ending).

commit.message:
Switch Google auth from popup to redirect flow

signInWithPopup is blocked by Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy on Vercel.
signInWithRedirect avoids popups entirely — user is redirected to
Google, then back to /sign-in where handleRedirectResult picks up
the token and creates the session.

commit.message:
fix: increase file lock retry to 6 attempts with longer backoff

Windows file locks from Defender/indexer/thumbnails are usually
transient. Previous 3 retries (3s total) was too short. Now retries
up to 6 times with 1/2/4/8/10s waits (25s total), matching the
patience of Explorer's built-in retry behavior.

commit.message:
fix: auto-repair orphan users missing OrganizationMembership

Users created via register() had User.organizationId set but no
OrganizationMembership record, causing "Sin organización activa" in
production. This fix:

1. register() now creates OrganizationMembership when organizationId is provided
2. Startup repair finds all orphan users and creates missing memberships
3. Runtime auto-repair in resolveTenantSelection() as safety net

fix: relax TestLoadInfo_UriInvalid assertion on Windows to require.Error

The MockLoader previously redirected http://localhost/null to a local file
path, giving a platform-specific 'file not found' error. With the real
loader the error is an HTTP response, so just assert any error occurs.
